title: 3D VTubing with Warudo: Complete Guide
description: Learn everything you need to start 3D VTubing with Warudo. From setting up your first model to advanced scene design, this course covers the complete workflow for becoming a professional 3D VTuber.

lessons.title: Introduction to VTubing
lessons.description: An overview of the VTubing landscape — what it is, how it works, and what you'll learn in this course. We'll look at examples of successful VTubers and break down the tech stack you need.

lessons.title: Setting Up Warudo
lessons.description: Download, install, and configure Warudo for the first time. We'll walk through the interface, key settings, and get your workspace ready for your first model.

lessons.title: Importing Your First 3D Model
lessons.description: Learn how to import VRM and other 3D model formats into Warudo. We'll cover model requirements, troubleshooting common import issues, and basic model adjustments.

lessons.title: Basic Motion Tracking Setup
lessons.description: Set up face and body tracking using your webcam or iPhone. Learn calibration techniques and how to fine-tune tracking sensitivity for natural-looking movement.

lessons.title: Expressions and Facial Tracking
lessons.description: Create custom expressions and fine-tune facial tracking. Set up hotkeys for quick expression changes during streams and configure blend shapes.

lessons.title: Scene Design Fundamentals
lessons.description: Design your first stream scene in Warudo. Learn about cameras, lighting, backgrounds, and how to create a visually appealing setup.

lessons.title: Props and Accessories
lessons.description: Add props, accessories, and interactive elements to your VTuber setup. Learn how to attach items to your model and trigger prop animations.

lessons.title: Advanced Scene Effects
lessons.description: Take your scenes to the next level with post-processing effects, screen overlays, particle systems, and dynamic backgrounds.

lessons.title: Stream Integration (OBS Setup)
lessons.description: Connect Warudo to OBS Studio for streaming. Learn about capture methods, scene setup in OBS, audio configuration, and stream optimization.

lessons.title: Going Live: Your First Stream
lessons.description: Everything you need for your first stream — pre-stream checklist, going live workflow, engaging with chat, and handling common issues during a broadcast.
